/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/RemotePatientMonitoring.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RemotePatientMonitoring.dir/src/DataGenerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RemotePatientMonitoring.dir/src/AnomalyDetector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RemotePatientMonitoring.dir/src/AlertManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RemotePatientMonitoring.dir/src/Dashboard.cpp.o -o RemotePatientMonitoring
